_meta.mandate: Every revenue number must trace to a verified DB column

revenue_column.name: deal_value
revenue_column.note: Numeric copy of valor (bigint). Use this for all arithmetic.

display_column.name: valor
display_column.note: Integer euros (e.g. 1500000). Use deal_value for calculations.

stage_column.name: fase
stage_column.note: Portuguese portal stage text. CANONICAL for closed-stage detection.

stage_compat_column.name: stage
stage_compat_column.note: Synced from fase. Use fase for stage logic, stage for compatibility.

agent_column.name: assigned_consultant
agent_column.note: Synced from agent_email. agent_email is the original column.

probability_column.name: probability
probability_column.note: Set by CRM at deal creation. Default 0.05.

closed_stages.note: These are FASE values (portal Portuguese stage). NOT deal.stage enum values.

name_compat.name: full_name
name_compat.note: Synced from name. Economics code uses full_name.

budget_columns.note: Original portal columns for lead budget range

workflowROI.ts.note: learning_events uses tenant_id (text added Wave 11) + org_id (original)

businessPrimitiveEngine.ts.select: id, deal_value, stage, fase, probability, created_at, actual_close_date, lost_at

revenue_constants.SYSTEM_ORG_ID_SOURCE: env var SYSTEM_ORG_ID (Vercel) — validated at boot by systemOrgValidator.ts
